exact_quote: Mystic Mountain at Nemacolin Woodlands Resort opened in 1995 ... 25 acres for snow sports ... seven slopes, three lifts and a terrain park ... 60-70 inches of snow on average ... Nemacolin is located in Farmington, Pennsylvania, just 70 miles southeast of Pittsburgh ... 90-minute transfer from Pittsburgh International Airport (PIT) ... 300-foot vertical drop ... Geronimo (the mountain's longest slope at one-half mile)
notes: Small PA ski hill at Nemacolin luxury resort in Laurel Highlands: 300ft vert, 25 acres, 7 slopes, 3 lifts, 1 terrain park. On-site lodging at Nemacolin Woodlands Resort. PIT ~70mi NW, 90min transfer. Cross-country and tubing also offered.

exact_quote: vertical drop is 240 feet ... 17 trails ... longest run is 1400 feet (1/2 mile) ... 3 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 3 conveyers, and 3 rope tows ... over 52 acres of skiable terrain ... 100% snowmaking and operations 7 days a week with 100% lit terrain ... located 25 miles from Boston
notes: Small Westford MA ski area near Boston: 240ft vert, 52 acres, 17 trails, 10 lifts total (3 triples, 1 double, 3 carpets, 3 rope tows), 100% snowmaking, 100% lit (night skiing). Tubing hill. BOS ~37mi, MHT ~30mi. Day-use only, no lodging.

exact_quote: Nordic Mountain has a vertical drop of 265 feet ... 50 inches ... 80 acres of terrain over 14 trails, and features 7 lifts of 3 types ... The nearest airport to Nordic Mountain is Appleton, 60 minutes drive away
notes: Central WI ski hill near Wild Rose: 265ft vert, 80 acres, 14 trails, 7 lifts, ~50" avg snowfall. ATW Appleton ~60min drive. Indy Pass resort. Tubing offered.

exact_quote: 960 feet vertical drop ... 110 inches annual snowfall ... 40 trails across 300 acres of skiable terrain ... 5 lifts of 4 types ... Base elevation of 5,365 feet and summit elevation of 7,060 feet ... new high-speed 6-pack chair lift, the Nordic Express
notes: Ogden Valley UT family resort: 960ft vert (base 5,365 / summit 7,060), 300 acres, 40 trails, 5 lifts incl high-speed 6-pack Nordic Express, 110" snow. Known for night skiing. SLC ~60mi south.

exact_quote: based in Mazama, Washington ... permitted by the United States Forest Service to operate in a 300,000-acre area of the Okanogan and Wenatchee National Forests ... vertical drop on their designated runs ranges from 1,500 feet to 4,000 feet ... runs generally start around 8,000' feet and pick-ups are generally at 5,000' ... 20 heli-skiers / day with two A-Star aircraft ... mid-January to mid-March, guaranteeing eight runs (typically over 14,000 vertical feet) per day
notes: Heli-skiing operator in Mazama WA (Methow Valley), Okanogan-Wenatchee NF, 300,000-acre permit area. Vertical 1,500-4,000ft per run; 8 runs/day ~14,000ft total. Mid-Jan to mid-March season. No lifts/trails — backcountry only. SEA ~4hr drive.

exact_quote: approximately 340 vertical feet of skiing across 35 acres of terrain served by two rope tows and a T-Bar ... operates the oldest continuously operating ski tow in the USA ... ski area began in 1936 ... operated entirely by volunteers ... in 1946, it was officially renamed Northeast Slopes
notes: Tiny East Corinth VT volunteer-run community ski area, home of USA's oldest continuously-operating rope tow (since 1936). 340ft vert, 35 acres, 3 lifts (2 rope tows + 1 T-bar). LEB Lebanon NH closest commercial airport, BTV further north.

exact_quote: Northern Maine Community Trails is a network of year-round trails for public use designed for Nordic skiing, mountain biking, hiking, and outdoor enjoyment ... groomed Nordic ski trail system ... Parking is available at the NMCT lodge lot or along the road at the Tom's Trail trailhead
notes: Madawaska/Aroostook County ME Nordic XC trail network — no lifts, no alpine. Groomed cross-country ski trails year-round volunteer operation. PQI Presque Isle nearest regional airport, BGR Bangor major airport.

exact_quote: 2,280 ft (690 m) vertical drop ... 3,170-acre (12.8 km²) ... 19 lifts ... seven different terrain parks for all different skills levels across 55 acres of terrain ... Reno/Tahoe International Airport is a 40-minute drive from Northstar California ... Opening Friday, November 21, 2025
notes: Major Vail-owned Tahoe resort: 2,280ft vert, 3,170 acres, 19 lifts, 7 terrain parks (55 acres). Northstar Village ski-in/out lodging. RNO 40min drive. Nov 21 2025 opening day.

exact_quote: Vertical Drop: 500 feet ... 17 trails ... 6 lifts ... one triple chair, two double chairs, and three surface lifts ... 27 inches of annual snowfall ... 186 acres of skiable terrain and the longest run is 1.4 miles
notes: Reopened UP MI ski hill near Norway: 500ft vert, 186 acres, 17 trails, 6 lifts, 27" OnTheSnow-reported snowfall, 1.4mi longest. IMT Ford Airport Iron Mountain ~15mi, GRB Green Bay larger commercial. Reopened 2024-25 with new ownership per SnowBrains.

exact_quote: vertical drop is 427 feet, with a base elevation of 911 feet and a top elevation of 1,338 feet ... 248 skiable acres and 53 total trails ... 8 chairlifts, 1 rope tow, and a magic carpet ... annual snowfall is approximately 135 inches ... 315 snow guns covering 240 acres
notes: Harbor Springs MI family resort opened 1958: 427ft vert, 248 acres, 53 trails, 10 lifts (8 chairs + rope tow + carpet), 135" snow, 315 snow guns. TVC Cherry Capital Traverse City ~60mi, DTW Detroit larger.

exact_quote: 650-foot vertical drop with a summit at 2,400 feet ... 22 scenic trails ... 1 Quad Chairlift, 1 T-bar, and 2 Surface Lifts ... quad chairlift transports 3,000 skiers per hour ... tubing hill, three miles of snowshoeing trails
notes: Speculator NY Adirondack family ski area: 650ft vert (summit 2,400), 22 trails, 4 lifts (quad + T-bar + 2 surface), tubing hill, snowshoeing. ALB Albany ~90min south, SYR Syracuse further.

exact_quote: total vertical drop is 500 feet ... 10 diverse trails across 38 skiable acres ... longest run is 0.94 miles ... A dedicated terrain park adds extra excitement ... 2 quad chairs, 1 double chair, and 1 surface lift ... only ski area in the state of Tennessee ... slopes generally open around Thanksgiving and remain open until mid-March
notes: Only TN ski area, Gatlinburg adventure park: 500ft vert, 38 acres, 10 trails, 4 lifts (2 quads + double + surface), 1 terrain park, 0.94mi longest. Thanksgiving-mid March season. TYS Knoxville ~50mi NW.

exact_quote: Oglebay Resort has skiing on an 815-foot slope with a 168-foot vertical drop ... wintertime, they have skiing, sledding and tubing ... full range of ski and snowboard equipment rentals ... one lift and can make snow ... Friday 4-9 PM, Saturday 9 AM-9 PM, and Sunday 9 AM-8 PM
notes: Wheeling WV resort with small ski slope: 168ft vert, 815ft slope, 1 lift, beginner trail. Tubing, sledding. Night skiing (Fri 4-9pm, Sat to 9pm). Full Oglebay Resort lodging. PIT ~60mi north.

exact_quote: largest vertical drop, 2,200', of the ski and snowboard areas in southern Vermont's Green Mountains ... 123 trails spread across 667 acres ... 21 chairlifts, including 1 high speed detachable 6-pack chair with protective bubbles and heated seats ... 200" of average annual snowfall ... November 22 as the target opening day
notes: Vail-owned Ludlow VT major resort, 70th anniv 2025-26: 2,200ft vert (largest in southern VT), 667 acres, 123 trails, 21 lifts incl bubble 6-pack, 200" snow. Nov 22 2025 target open. BTV ~75mi N, RUT Rutland ~14mi closer. Jackson Gore lodging on-mountain.

exact_quote: vertical drop of 400 feet and a base elevation of 1,300 feet with a summit at 1,700 feet ... 11 trails ... 60 acres ... one double chair and three surface lifts: a pony tow, a handle tow, and a T-Bar ... ski area in Otis, Massachusetts in southeastern Berkshire County ... presently owned by Ski Butternut, who acquired it in 2016
notes: Small Berkshires MA family ski area in Otis: 400ft vert (base 1,300 / summit 1,700), 60 acres, 11 trails, 4 lifts (double + pony tow + handle tow + T-bar). Owned by Ski Butternut since 2016. BDL Hartford ~50mi south, ALB Albany also close.

exact_quote: Founded in 1939, Otsego Resort has been a Northern Michigan favorite for generations ... 31 slopes ... 6.2 miles of marked cross‑country trails ... 5 chair lifts including a high speed quad ... Gaylord is in the heart of Michigan's snow belt and is blessed with a hearty snowfall of about 150 inches per year
notes: Gaylord MI resort (founded 1939) in Sturgeon River Valley: ~300ft vert, 31 slopes, 5 chairs incl high-speed quad, 150" snow, 6.2mi XC trails. On-site lodging. TVC Cherry Capital ~70mi NW.

exact_quote: 1,440 feet ... 750 skiable acres ... five chairlifts including three doubles, one triple and a quad ... eastern slopes of the Jemez Mountains near Los Alamos ... 40 trails ... Opening day for the winter 2025-2026 season is scheduled for December 14, 2025 ... Albuquerque airport is 75 miles away from Los Alamos
notes: Los Alamos NM ski hill on Jemez Mtns: 1,440ft vert, 750 acres, 40 trails (incl tree skiing), 5 chairs. Dec 14 2025 target opening. ABQ Albuquerque ~98mi (~1h45m drive). Co-owned with Sipapu.

exact_quote: 2,850 feet ... 6,000 skiable acres total (3,600 at Palisades Mountain and 2,400 at Alpine Mountain) ... 39 total lifts, including 1 tram (110-person), 1 funitel (28-person gondola), 7 high-speed six packs, 5 express quads ... Annual snowfall at Palisades Tahoe can surpass 500 inches ... Reno-Tahoe International Airport ... 45-minute drive ... Opening Wednesday, November 26
notes: Major Alterra-owned Tahoe resort (former Squaw + Alpine): 2,850ft vert, 6,000 acres (combined), 39 lifts incl tram + funitel. 500+ inches snow. Nov 26 2025 opening. RNO 45min. Village at Palisades lodging.

exact_quote: 65 skiable acres with a vertical drop of 300 feet from a base elevation of 600 feet to a summit of 900 feet ... 15 trails—25% beginner, 55% intermediate, and 20% advanced—along with one terrain park and a dedicated tubing hill ... eight lifts, including one high-speed quad, one fixed quad, three triples, one double, and two surface lifts ... night skiing across all 65 acres ... modest natural annual snowfall of about 23 inches
notes: Vail-owned southern IN resort: 300ft vert, 65 acres, 15 trails, 8 lifts incl HSQ, 1 terrain park, tubing hill, 100% night skiing, 100% snowmaking (only 23" natural). SDF Louisville ~50mi south.

exact_quote: 7,300 acres of skiable terrain ... 346 trails and 41 lifts ... base elevation is 6,800 ft, rising to a summit of 10,023 ft, with a vertical drop of 3,226 ft ... average annual snowfall of 355 inches ... 6 terrain parks ... 35 minutes from Salt Lake City International Airport ... Opening November 21
notes: Largest US resort (Vail): 7,300 acres, 346 trails, 41 lifts, 3,226ft vert (base 6,800/summit 10,023), 355" snow, 6 terrain parks. Nov 21 2025 opening, new Sunrise Gondola for Canyons. SLC 35min. Park City Village ski-in/out lodging.

exact_quote: vertical drop of 770 feet ... 28 trails, with 50% novice, 21% intermediate, 12% advanced, and 17% expert terrain ... 11 lifts with a mix of triple chairs, double chairs, and surface lifts ... average of 100 inches of snowfall ... 100% snowmaking coverage ... terrain parks, a snow tubing park
notes: Henniker NH Indy Pass family resort: 770ft vert, 28 trails, 11 lifts, 100" snow, 100% snowmaking, terrain parks + tubing park + night skiing. MHT Manchester ~25mi east.

nearest_airport_name: Green Bay Austin Straubel International Airport
exact_quote: 150 feet of vertical drop ... 17 runs, including five brand new trails for this season ... Two lifts transport the guests ... vintage 1967 Hall T-Bar ... small, family-friendly ski area located in the Northwoods community of Lakewood, Wisconsin ... popular for night skiing
notes: Lakewood WI Northwoods family hill (Indy Pass): 150ft vert, 17 runs, 2 lifts incl vintage 1967 Hall T-bar. Night skiing emphasis. GRB Green Bay ~60mi SE.

exact_quote: lift-served summit is 8,560 feet (2,609 m), with a vertical drop of 2,200 ft (671 m) ... 1100 skiable acres ... 3 triple lifts and 1 conveyor lift ... average of 225" snowfall annually ... 54 runs, with terrain ratings of 12% beginner, 35% intermediate, and 53% advanced ... Portneuf Range in the Caribou National Forest, east of Pocatello
notes: Southeast ID locals' mountain near Pocatello: 2,200ft vert (summit 8,560), 1,100 acres, 54 runs, 4 lifts (3 triples + conveyor), 225" snow, advanced-leaning. PIH Pocatello ~25mi west.

exact_quote: 27 runs, serviced by 9 lifts, and 400 feet of vertical drop ... 3 separate terrain parks ... average of 105 inches of snow each year, supported by 85% snowmaking ... southwestern New York in Chautauqua County ... Located in Findley Lake, New York ... Erie, PA (30 minutes)
notes: Findley Lake NY resort (Indy Pass): 400ft vert, 27 runs, 9 lifts, 3 terrain parks, 105" snow, 85% snowmaking. On-site resort lodging + spa. ERI Erie PA ~30min, BUF Buffalo ~1.5hr.

exact_quote: 400 feet ... 100 acres ... 12 lifts consisting of two quads, three triples, and seven surface lifts ... 24" average annual snowfall ... 23 trails ... located in Lawrenceburg, Indiana, and was founded in 1980 by Clyde Perfect and his family ... 245 fixed-position snow guns
notes: Lawrenceburg IN family resort (founded 1980): 400ft vert, 100 acres, 23 trails, 12 lifts (2 quads + 3 triples + 7 surface), 24" natural snow + heavy snowmaking (245 guns). CVG Cincinnati ~30mi south.

exact_quote: 1,967-foot (600-meter) vertical drop ... 58 trails ... 7 lifts, with two high-speed detachable quads among them ... 468 acres get about 250 inches of snowfall each year ... located in Killington, Vermont
notes: Killington-affiliated VT classic: 1,967ft vert, 468 acres, 58 trails, 7 lifts incl 2 HSQs, 250" snow. Slopeside Pico Village condos. BTV ~85mi N, RUT Rutland ~15mi closer.

exact_quote: 300 feet of vertical drop ... seventeen trails and three terrain parks ... signature trail is 'The Wall' which is a steep mogul run ... twelve lifts ... six chairlifts, five rope tows and a Wondercarpet ... elevation of 1,201 feet ... Pine Knob is the second-highest ski resort in Southeast Michigan
notes: Clarkston MI SE-Michigan ski area: 300ft vert, 17 trails, 12 lifts (6 chairs + 5 rope tows + carpet), 3 terrain parks, signature mogul run 'The Wall'. DTW Detroit ~45mi south.

exact_quote: Vertical Drop: 500 feet ... 35 trails ... 4 lifts ... 35 inches of annual snowfall ... located two miles from Iron Mountain, MI ... 220 acres
notes: Iron Mountain UP MI resort: 500ft vert, 220 acres, 35 trails, 4 lifts (3 chairs + rope tow). On-site lodging at resort. Famous for Pine Mountain ski jump (FIS). IMT Ford Airport ~2mi, GRB Green Bay larger commercial.

exact_quote: 25 kilometers of scenic trails open daily for both skate and classic skiing in the picturesque, sunny Plain Valley ... Plain Valley Ski Trails (PVST) is a nonprofit 501(c)(3) founded in 2018 ... over 25 km of Classic & Skate Skiing Tracks plus over 7 km of Snowshoe Trails
notes: Plain WA Nordic XC trail system (nonprofit, founded 2018): 25km classic+skate trails + 7km snowshoe trails. Mostly beginner. No alpine/lifts. EAT Wenatchee nearest regional, SEA major. Cascade Mtns.

exact_quote: vertical drop of 1,100 feet ... 35 trails and three lifts on 75 acres of terrain ... one double and one triple ... average annual snowfall of 175 inches ... Snowmaking covers 75 percent of its skiable terrain ... privately owned and operated ski resort northwest of Catskill Park in the town of Roxbury, New York ... Albany International Airport (ALB) is closest (1.5 hours) ... typically only open Friday through Sunday
notes: Roxbury NY Catskills independent: 1,100ft vert, 75 acres, 35 trails, 3 lifts (double + triple + carpet), 175" snow, 75% snowmaking. Tubing offered. Fri-Sun + powder days operation. ALB ~1.5hr.
